mapper.select: select * from user_auth where auth_account = #{email} and auth_type = 'email' limit 1
select * from user_auth where user_id = #{userId} and auth_type = 'email' limit 1
select * from app_user where id = #{userId} limit 1
select * from user_profile where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select coalesce(sum(duration_seconds), 0) from study_timer_record where user_id = #{userId} and status = 'finished'
select * from user_privacy_setting where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select * from user_blacklist where user_id = #{userId} order by id desc
select u.id from app_user u left join user_notification_setting s on s.user_id = u.id where u.status = 1 and coalesce(s.system_announcement_enabled, 1) = 1 order by u.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into app_user (user_no, nickname, avatar_url, status, last_login_time) values (#{userNo}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{status}, #{lastLoginTime})
insert into user_auth (user_id, auth_type, auth_account, password_hash, password_salt, is_verified) values (#{userId}, #{authType}, #{authAccount}, #{passwordHash}, #{passwordSalt}, #{isVerified})
insert into user_profile (user_id, bio, timezone) values (#{userId}, #{bio}, #{timezone})

insert into user_privacy_setting (user_id, allow_friend_view_profile, allow_teammate_view_study, allow_stranger_message) values (#{userId}, #{allowFriendViewProfile}, #{allowTeammateViewStudy}, #{allowStrangerMessage})

insert into user_session (user_id, device_type, device_slot, device_id, session_token, status, login_time, logout_time) values (#{userId}, #{deviceType}, #{deviceSlot}, #{deviceId}, #{sessionToken}, #{status}, #{loginTime}, #{logoutTime}) on duplicate key update device_type = values(device_type), device_id = values(device_id), session_token = values(session_token), status = values(status), login_time = values(login_time), logout_time = values(logout_time)
